displayNameZh: 远：痛点来源于网路上的陌生人
summary: Yt Far Strangers component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「远：痛点来源于网路上的陌生人」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-far-strangers/src/YtFarStrangers.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtFarStrangers` and `ytFarStrangersDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Far Strangers Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-far-strangers to my project. Preserve the exported YtFarStrangersProps API and register the YtFarStrangers composition with the default props.
